title: Mounted Local Analytics Tag Route Shells
summary: Mounted the analytics tag route shells in the local Studio app server while preserving their existing browser modules and DOM contracts.
effect: The local Studio app now serves /studio/analytics/tag-registry/, /studio/analytics/tag-aliases/, /studio/analytics/series-tags/, and /studio/analytics/series-tag-editor/?series=<series_id> directly. Those pages load the same vanilla JavaScript modules and shell markup contracts as the Jekyll routes, but receive local runtime config and use /studio/api/analytics reads and writes instead of the legacy 8787 fallback endpoints. The follow-on legacy-shell retirement change removes the old Jekyll tag route files and stops the standalone tag write server from being part of default startup.
verification: Python compile checks passed for the touched Studio app server, view, config, and smoke files
